---
title: "MAT103 Calculus Stories"
---

# Welcome

This website is a collection of **calculus stories**. Instead of only learning formulas, we explore the story of how calculus was discovered, challenged, and rebuilt over generations.

## Current Stories

- **[The Gaussian Integral](gaussian.qmd)**: Three ways to evaluate the classical Euler–Poisson integral, tracing its history from Feynman's high school textbook to the lost planet Ceres, along with extensions to Fresnel integrals and multidimensional spaces.

---

> "Calculus is the mathematical language of change, but its own history is a story of continuous revolution."
